description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steep, ornate gable roof adorned with dragon-head carvings at the peaks, evoking a Norse or Viking aesthetic. The roof is covered in blue-gray shingles, some of which appear weathered or missing, and features a stone chimney emitting smoke. The cabin sits on a small landscaped plot with stone pathways, wooden barrels, crates, and lush greenery including pine trees and flowering bushes. The front facade has a wooden door, a small porch with a ladder, and a prominent horn or bell above the entrance. Windows are asymmetrically placed, with a lattice window on one side and a small dormer on the roof. The structure combines log and plank construction, with visible timber beams and stone foundations.
description: A Norse-inspired wooden cabin with a steep, dragon-adorned gable roof, stone chimney, and lush landscaping. Features include a front porch, asymmetrical windows, and rustic log construction.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a wooden door, a small porch, a ladder, and a large horn or bell above the door, flanked by pine trees and barrels.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the tall, ornate gable roof with dragon carvings, the stone chimney with smoke, and a side entrance beneath a sloped roof.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the cabin with a covered porch area, timber beams, and a small awning, as well as more pine trees and stonework.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals a large lattice window, stone pathway, and the full length of the blue-gray shingled roof with dragon-head details.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with dragon-head ridge decorations, blue-gray shingles, and a stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with one large lattice window on the right side, a small dormer window on the roof, and a few small windows scattered on the sides
attribute_door_placement: one main wooden door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, and a possible side entrance under the sloped roof on the left
